name: Orange-Macaroon Pudding 1898
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the macaroons. Crush enough to make 1 tablespoon and set aside.
2. Soak the remainder in milk for 15 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs, sugar, and salt until smooth.
4. Add the crushed macaroon crumbs and milk to the egg mixture, then stir in the orange juice and zest.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered 1-quart mold or bowl and cover tightly with foil.
6. Place the covered mold in a steamer and cover the steamer.
7. Steam over simmering water for 1 hour to 1 hour 15 minutes.
8. Remove from the steamer and let cool for 5 to 10 minutes.
9. Turn out the pudding into serving dishes and sprinkle with reserved macaroon crumbs.
10. Serve warm.
[6 servings. Each serving: 225 calories; 108 mg sodium; 165 mg cholesterol; 9 grams fat; 32 grams carbohydrates; 7 grams protein; 0.40 gram fiber.]
